why_visit: The largest and most iconic royal palace of the Joseon Dynasty. A must-visit landmark to understand Korea's history and culture.
tips: Visit early to avoid crowds and watch the Royal Guard Changing Ceremony.

why_visit: A beautiful neighborhood filled with traditional Korean hanok houses and narrow alleys perfect for photography.
tips: Please keep noise levels low as local residents still live in the area.

why_visit: The best place to experience traditional Korean culture, tea houses, art galleries, and souvenir shops.
tips: Try a traditional Korean tea and browse local handicrafts.

why_visit: Seoul's most famous shopping district packed with street food, cosmetics, fashion stores, and vibrant city energy.
tips: Most food stalls become active in the late afternoon and evening.

why_visit: One of Seoul's most recognizable landmarks offering breathtaking panoramic views of the city skyline.
tips: Arrive before sunset to enjoy both daytime and nighttime views of Seoul.

why_visit: Famous for the Moonlight Rainbow Fountain and Han River night views.
tips: Best fountain shows are on weekend evenings.

why_visit: A riverside park and cultural space with relaxed night atmosphere.
Observation deck in Lotte World Tower with sweeping Seoul skyline views.
tips: Book tickets online to skip the queue.

why_visit: Short hike to a lesser-known viewpoint over the Han River and city lights.
tips: Bring a light jacket; it can be windy at the top.
